description: This file contains SCSS mixins for generating grid systems, including flexbox and CSS grid layouts, with support for responsive breakpoints, gutters, offsets, and column configurations.

methods.name: make-row
methods.description: Creates a flex container with wrapping and gutter margins for a grid row.

methods.name: make-col-ready
methods.description: Prepares a column with default sizing and padding, ensuring it fits within the grid.

methods.name: make-col
methods.description: Defines a column with optional size and maximum width based on total columns.

methods.name: make-col-offset
methods.description: Offsets a column by a specified number of columns.

methods.name: row-cols
methods.description: Defines a row with a specific number of columns, supporting wrapping.

methods.name: make-grid-columns
methods.description: Generates responsive grid column classes for different breakpoints.

methods.name: make-cssgrid
methods.description: Generates CSS grid column classes for different breakpoints.
